## Meeting Purpose

[Handover to a new GrowthX contact and align on the content review process and Q1 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Contact:** Matthew Alves-Hill is the new primary contact, taking over steady-state content production and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Streamlined Review:** The content review process is now sequential (PMM → N-able SEO) to prevent conflicting edits and accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategic Focus:** Content will prioritize COVE and MDR (Managed Detection & Response) to drive new customer acquisition (NCA), as UEM growth is flat.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [**Weekly Cadence Goal:** The target is a 2–3 business day review turnaround to enable a weekly publish cycle, with Elaine (N-able) project managing PMMs.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Content Strategy & Goals

  - [**Primary Focus:** COVE and MDR.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**MDR:** High leadership pressure to drive new customer acquisition (NCA).](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish N-able as a leader in the MDR space against competitors (e.g., Huntress).](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [**Secondary Focus:** UEM.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [Growth targets are flat year-over-year; content will not be a primary driver.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**Content Direction:** Shift toward commercial keywords and listicles to generate leads.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**Attribution:** N-able's multi-touch attribution (MTA) reporting will track the full-funnel impact of top-of-funnel content, not just last-touch conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The previous parallel review process caused conflicting edits and delays.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new sequential workflow in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
    1.  [**GrowthX → PMM Review:** PMMs provide product-specific feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
    2.  [**GrowthX → N-able Content Review:** After PMMs approve, GrowthX manually changes the status, triggering an automated email to the N-able SEO team (Nick, Andrew, Elaine).](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
    3.  [**N-able SEO Team Review:** Elaine provides final SEO/editorial feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
    4.  [**GrowthX:** Incorporates all feedback into one final draft.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Turnaround Goal:** 2–3 business days per review stage to support a weekly publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**PMM Management:** Elaine will project manage PMMs to ensure timely reviews, as they require proactive follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Content Pipeline & Logistics

  - [**Current Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [3 articles are in PMM review (edited with the new product artifact).](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [1 article is in N-able content review; Elaine has provided SEO feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**This Week's Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [5 new articles are in progress, due by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [Product focus: 2 N-Central, 2 Cove, 1 multi-product.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**Technical Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [**Airtable Automation:** The "Garrett" email error will be fixed by rebuilding the notification automation.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [**Image Ratio:** The image ratio was adjusted to the requested spec.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### Future Content Planning

  - [**Q1 Campaign Alignment:** Elaine proposed an "Attack Resilience" content pillar to align with N-able's Q1 campaign calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
      - [**Action:** Once approved internally, N-able will share the topics (keywords, descriptions) for GrowthX to add to ContentOS.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [**Gated Asset:** GrowthX will share the gated asset outline with PMMs for feedback on product mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Matt):**](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Rebuild the Airtable notification automation to fix the "Garrett" email error.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Share the gated asset outline with PMMs for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**N-able (Elaine):**](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [Finalize the "Attack Resilience" content pillar internally.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [Share the approved topics with GrowthX for addition to ContentOS.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [**N-able (Nick, Andrew, Elaine):**](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [Communicate the new sequential review process to PMMs.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [Project manage PMMs to meet the 2–3 business day review goal.](https://fathom.video/share/9z9sukxXAVNaNu8UZm_G7KaxdJiZ6zAL?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
